raw_consumer_statement: I went to an establishment on XX/XX/2024 and was charged {$620.00} when I shouldve only been charged {$410.00}. I brought this to the attention of the establishment and was told I would be refunded. I was then charged a second time on XX/XX/2024 for {$200.00}. I was refunded {$200.00} on XX/XX/XXXX. I am still needing a refund of an additional {$200.00} because in total I was overcharged {$410.00}. My credit card company repeatedly resolved the issue after I sent in documentation and they stated that the refund on {$200.00} was the resolution after i repeatedly informed them that is incorrect. I sent in documentation of receipts on XX/XX/2024 I was told on XX/XX/2024 that my documentation had been received and they are reviewing it. I called today on XX/XX/2024 because I received another email that my dispute was closed and I was informed by a XXXX that no documentation had been received.
